svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ PANOPTIC SEGMENTATION │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Combines semantic + instance segmentation:
Semantic Seg Instance Seg Panoptic Seg (stuff classes) (thing classes) (unified)
┌─────────────┐ ┌─────────────┐ ┌─────────────┐ │ ████ sky │ │ ▓▓ car1 │ │ ████ sky │ │ │ + │ ░░ car2 │ = │ ▓▓ car1 │ │ ████ road │ │ person │ │ ░░ car2 │ │ │ │ ● │ │ ████ road │ └─────────────┘ └─────────────┘ └─────────────┘
Thing classes: Countable objects (cars, people) → Instance labels Stuff classes: Amorphous regions (sky, road) → Semantic labels
Panoptic Quality (PQ) Metric: ──────────────────────────── PQ = SQ × RQ
where: • SQ (Segmentation Quality) = Average IoU of matched segments • RQ (Recognition Quality) = TP / (TP + 0.5×FP + 0.5×FN)
